lex.bot.outputcontext.Name.Description: The name of the output context.

lex.bot.outputcontext.TimeToLiveInSecond.Description: The amount of time, in seconds, that the output context should remain active. The time is figured from the first time the context is sent to the user.

lex.bot.outputcontext.TurnsToLive.Description: The number of conversation turns that the output context should remain active. The number of turns is counted from the first time that the context is sent to the user.
